source_pr.title: sessionctx: fix hidden and user var problems in encoding session states
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #40614

Problem Summary:
I've checked the new members of `SessionVars` from v6.2.0, and all of them are unnecessary to encode:
- `PlanReplayerFinishedTaskKey` is used for the plan replayer and will be cleared after its capacity exceeds 128, so it's unimportant because it will be cleared at any time anyway.
- `shardRand` is used for shard_row_id and its lifetime is transaction-level.
- `ProtectedTSList` is used for prepared statements and its lifetime is statement-level.

But there are 2 problems:
- `SysVar.Hidden` is deprecated, so original hidden variables should be encoded now
- The locking of UserVars introduced from #37046 may cause a potential data race

### What is changed and how it works?
- Remove checking of `SysVars.Hidden`
- Fix the locking problem of UserVars

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

analysis:
PR title: sessionctx: fix hidden and user var problems in encoding session states
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/40754
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: fix another data race
Changed files (5): session/session.go, sessionctx/sessionstates/session_states_test.go, sessionctx/variable/BUILD.bazel, sessionctx/variable/session.go, sessionctx/variable/session_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
